name: report_constant_paths
full_help:
report_constant_paths

Description: 
Report constant paths

Syntax: 
report_constant_paths  [-max_paths_per_endpoint <arg>] [-column_style <arg>]
                       [-file <arg>] [-append] [-no_header]
                       [-of_objects <args>] [-return_string] [-quiet]
                       [-verbose] [<objects>]

Usage: 
  Name                       Description
  --------------------------------------
  [-max_paths_per_endpoint]  Number of branches per endpoint to report traces
                             for
                             Default: 1
  [-column_style]            Style for path report columns: Values: 
                             variable_width, anchor_left, fixed_width
                             Default: variable_width
  [-file]                    Filename to output results to. (send output to 
                             console if -file is not used)
  [-append]                  Append the results to file, don't overwrite the 
                             results file
  [-no_header]               Do not generate a report header
  [-of_objects]              Report constant paths for these constant paths
  [-return_string]           Return report as string
  [-quiet]                   Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                 Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<objects>]                Endpoint pins or instances

Categories: 
Report, Timing
